A '''battle''' took place in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on a [[Unidentified rainy planet (Clone Wars)|rainy planet]].

{{Battle-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This battle can be seen toward the beginning of the first episode of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''.
